articles.title: Fed Signals Potential Rate Cut in Q2 2026
articles.title_cn: 美联储暗示2026年第二季度可能降息
articles.summary: Federal Reserve Chair indicated openness to rate cuts if inflation continues to moderate, boosting equity markets.
articles.summary_cn: 美联储主席表示如果通胀继续缓和，可能考虑降息，提振股市。

articles.title: US-China Trade Tensions Ease After New Framework Agreement
articles.title_cn: 美中贸易紧张关系在新框架协议后缓解
articles.summary: New bilateral trade framework reduces tariff uncertainty for tech and manufacturing sectors.
articles.summary_cn: 新双边贸易框架减少了科技和制造业的关税不确定性。

articles.title: AI Infrastructure Spending Surges 40% YoY
articles.title_cn: AI基础设施支出同比激增40%
articles.summary: Major tech companies increase capital expenditure on AI infrastructure, benefiting semiconductor and data center stocks.
articles.summary_cn: 大型科技公司增加AI基础设施资本支出，利好半导体和数据中心股票。

articles.title: Consumer Spending Shows Signs of Slowdown
articles.title_cn: 消费支出显示放缓迹象
articles.summary: Retail sales data disappoints as consumers pull back on discretionary spending amid persistent inflation.
articles.summary_cn: 零售销售数据令人失望，消费者在持续通胀下减少可选消费支出。

articles.title: Oil Prices Drop on Increased OPEC+ Production
articles.summary: OPEC+ agrees to gradually increase output, putting downward pressure on crude prices. Positive for airlines and transport.
articles.summary_cn: OPEC+同意逐步增产，对原油价格形成下行压力。利好航空和运输业。

articles.title: European Central Bank Holds Rates Steady
articles.title_cn: 欧洲央行维持利率不变
articles.summary: ECB maintains current rates as eurozone inflation remains above target, limited direct US market impact.
articles.summary_cn: 欧洲央行维持当前利率不变，欧元区通胀仍高于目标，对美国市场影响有限。

articles.title: US Infrastructure Bill Passes Senate Committee
articles.title_cn: 美国基建法案通过参议院委员会
articles.summary: Bipartisan $200B infrastructure package advances, boosting materials, industrials, and construction sectors.
articles.summary_cn: 两党2000亿美元基建方案推进，提振原材料、工业和建筑板块。

articles.title: Cybersecurity Threats Drive Enterprise Spending Higher
articles.title_cn: 网络安全威胁推动企业支出上升
articles.summary: Enterprise cybersecurity budgets increase 25% amid rising ransomware attacks.
articles.summary_cn: 随着勒索软件攻击增加，企业网络安全预算增长25%。
